steps: Survey related work PDFs and extract key ideas on multimodal structure prediction and diffusion models
Design unified architecture taking protein sequence, nucleic acid sequence, and small-molecule graph as inputs, outputting 3D complex via diffusion
Implement lightweight prototype components: data loaders for PDB/SDF, simple equivariant diffusion over ligand conditioned on frozen protein
Compute and visualize basic geometric features of provided protein and ligand (distance distributions, contact maps)
Mock training loop on synthetic noise to demonstrate diffusion behaviour (no real training here due to resource limits)
Generate figures summarizing geometry and illustrative diffusion trajectories
Write full report (methods, proposed model, experiments on sample complex, limitations)
